title: The Mysterious Lake That Changes Color

scenes.text: This lake can shift from deep blue to emerald green!
This is Lake Batur, located in Bali, Indonesia.
The color changes due to volcanic activity and algae growth.
Surrounded by stunning mountains and lush greenery.
scenes.label: SCENIC SURROUNDINGS

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Lake Batur, Bali - Indonesia. A picturesque lake with mesmerizing colors that shift with volcanic activity. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
